title: Requiem
description: This is a vanilla modpack that adds QOL features and is designed with a specific community playstyle in mind.
body:
This is a light vanilla modpack designed for a specific community/playstyle. It can be installed on the client, but also includes datapacks for world generation. Additional functionality is added to some mods when also installed on the server.

Includes QOL mods and additional functionality (such as inventory sorting and Xaero's World Map).
